data.title: Expert Arthur Hayes questions if Crypto's 4-year cycle has ended, attributing previous peaks to fiat liquidity changes rather than Bitcoin halving.
data.description: According to Arthur Hayes, historical peaks and declines in Bitcoin's price were associated with changes in fiat liquidity rather than the actual date of the Bitcoin halving event. Hayes suggests that fluctuations in fiat liquidity levels, rather than the halving events, have a stronger influence on the cryptocurrency's price movements. This perspective challenges the common notion that Bitcoin halving directly impacts its price dynamics. Hayes' analysis implies that understanding and monitoring fiat liquidity changes could be more crucial in predicting Bitcoin's future price trends.

data.title: Planet Labs PBC will have an Investor Day on Oct 16, 2025, in New York. Program starts at 9 am ET and key leaders will present.
data.description: Planet Labs PBC, a key player in Earth data and insights, disclosed intentions to conduct an Investor Day in New York on October 16, 2025. The event, set to commence at 9 a.m. Eastern Time / 6 a.m. Pacific Time, will involve sessions with significant leaders such as Co-Founder and CEO Will Marshall, Chief Revenue Officer Charlie Candy, and Co-Founder and Chief Strategy Officer Robbie Schingler. This announcement comes as Planet Labs PBC continues to make strides in the field, listed under NYSE as PL.

data.title: Tim Dorris appointed CRO at Wordsmith AI to boost growth in legal AI with his expertise from Stensul, enhancing enterprise workflows and scaling B2B software companies.
data.description: A recent announcement states that Tim Dorris has been named the Chief Revenue Officer at Wordsmith AI in New York. His appointment aims to bolster growth as the legal AI sector reaches a critical juncture. Dorris, who previously held the role of CRO at Stensul, a marketing creation platform, brings significant experience in enterprise software. He is recognized for his success in expanding B2B software firms. With the rising trend of in-house legal teams embracing AI solutions to enhance efficiency, Dorris is poised to lead Wordsmith into a new phase of development.

data.title: Law firm investigates vision loss cases related to Ozempic & other semaglutide drugs after EMA confirms NAION risk.
data.description: In Port Washington, New York, on October 10, 2025, Parker Waichman LLP, a well-known law firm specializing in representing victims of faulty drugs and medical devices, is currently managing cases for individuals who experienced vision loss following the use of certain products. The firm is dedicated to supporting those affected and aiding them in seeking justice for their hardships.

data.title: Gold prices surpassed $4,000, driven by inflation fears and safe haven demand, indicating a profit opportunity for mining stocks.
data.description: A recent news commentary released by Rush Gold Corp. indicated that the price of gold surpassed $4,000, marking a historic milestone. This surge was influenced by ongoing worries about inflation and increased demand for safe-haven assets due to economic instability. This development is significant as it signals a new record high for gold prices, reflecting the current market conditions and investor sentiment towards precious metals.

data.title: DC Capital Partners acquires Aeronautical & General Instruments Limited, an engineering business. Alexandria-based firm focused on gov investments.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, an Alexandria, VA headquartered private equity firm, DC Capital Partners, specializing in Government and Engineering sector investments, disclosed the purchase of Aeronautical & General Instruments Limited (AGI).

data.title: Saudi Arabia's essential oils market to hit $198.24 million by 2030, growing at 9.39% CAGR. Rising demand for natural products.
data.description: In Dublin, a report titled "Saudi Arabia Essential Oils Market by Region, Competition, Forecast & Opportunities, 2020-2030F" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Saudi Arabia Essential Oils Market, valued at USD 115.67 million in 2024, is estimated to grow to USD 198.24 million by 2030 at a CAGR of 9.39%. Growth in the market is attributed to the rising demand for natural and organic products among consumers, resulting in the widespread use of essential oils.

data.title: Daikin partners with ForeFront Power on 1.2 MW DC rooftop solar project in Mexico for production plants.
data.description: In San Luis Potosi, Mexico, Daikin Manufacturing México (DMMX), part of Daikin Industries, Ltd., a top global provider of air conditioning and heating solutions, has finished a rooftop solar project. The solar project measures 1.2 megawatts-DC (MW DC) and was completed with ForeFront Power. ForeFront Power is known for developing and managing commercial and industrial-scale solar energy and storage projects. This initiative saw the installation of new solar energy arrays on the roofs of DMMX's two latest production facilities in the region.

data.title: 406 Energy Holdings partners with NGP Natural Resources XIII, LP. Initial equity from NGP & team. Founded by 4 members. Formerly at XCL Resources.
data.description: Houston-based company 406 Energy, LLC has been established with an initial equity commitment from NGP Natural Resources XIII, L.P. and the company's management team. It was founded by partners Mark Graeve, Tom Kastens, Josh Sigler, and Eric Matus. The team previously worked together at XCL Resources, where they were part of the pre-asset team of the upstream oil and gas company that achieved status as the largest oil producer.

data.title: Civitas Resources, Inc. (NYSE: CIVI) to release Q3 2025 results on Nov 6 after market close, conference call on Nov 7 at 7am MT.
data.description: Denver-based company Civitas Resources, Inc. (NYSE: CIVI) shared intentions to unveil its Q3 2025 operational and financial outcomes post-market hours on November 6, 2025. Following this disclosure, a conference call and webcast are scheduled for November 7, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. MT (9:00 a.m. ET). To join the call, dial 888-510-2535 with passcode 4872770. Access to a live webcast and event replay will be provided on the Investor Relations section.

data.title: BCH price may reach $620-650 in 2 weeks, with $519.5 as crucial support level, as per analysis on October 10, 2025.
data.description: The price forecast for BCH indicates a positive trend, with technical indicators suggesting a potential rise to the range of $620-650 in the next two weeks. It is crucial for the support level of $519.5 to be maintained for the upward movement to continue.

data.title: Laird Superfood introduces limited Maple Instant Latte with functional mushrooms, aiming for authenticity among fake flavors.
data.description: For a limited period, consumers can enjoy the real taste of maple with the Maple Instant Latte, which stands out among other artificial seasonal flavors. Launched by Laird Superfood®, Inc. (NYSE American: LSF) based in Boulder, Colorado, this authentic maple latte is now available from October 10, 2025. The company is renowned for its functional coffee products, and this new offering aims to cater to those seeking genuine maple flavor.

data.title: Eaton DC wins One Michelin Key for second year and second place in Conde Nast Traveler awards.
data.description: In an exciting update from Washington on October 10, 2025, Eaton DC, the primary property of Eaton Workshop, has achieved the prestigious accolade of retaining One Michelin Key for the second year in a row. Additionally, the hotel has landed in the second position in Condé Nast Traveler's acclaimed Readers' Choice Awards for Best Hotel. These achievements highlight Eaton DC's commitment to excellence and quality service.

data.title: Canaan Inc. reports 9.30 EH/s hashrate, 1,582 BTC, 2,830 ETH treasury, and largest 3-year miner order.
data.description: The level of deployed hashrate has recently surged to a record-breaking high of 9.30 exahashes per second. Additionally, the cryptocurrency treasury has amassed an all-time high of 1,582 BTC and 2,830 ETH. Notably, the largest miner order in the past three years has been successfully secured. This significant development comes from Canaan Inc. (NASDAQ: CAN), a pioneering company in the field of crypto mining, based in Singapore.

data.title: Fungi Perfecti, LLC certified as a Leading Living Wage Employer, guaranteeing full family living wage to all employees.
data.description: Fungi Perfecti, LLC, the parent company of Host Defense® Mushrooms™, has been acknowledged as a top Living Wage Employer in Olympia, Washington. The company was officially certified by Living Wage For US on October 10, 2025. This certification recognizes the company's commitment to pay its employees a living wage, highlighting their dedication to fair treatment and support for their workforce.

data.title: Florida-based TDR Industries and Reshef Technologies launch Flash Fuzes USA to produce advanced fuzes for defense systems.
data.description: A new defense collaboration based in Florida is set to manufacture advanced fuzes for mortars, artillery, and UAS systems. TDR Industries, a Defense Manufacturer & Broker from Florida, has partnered with Reshef Technologies from Israel to create Flash Fuzes. This venture, established on October 10, 2025, will focus on developing cutting-edge fuzes for military applications. This partnership brings together the expertise of both companies to deliver high-quality products for defense operations.

data.title: Synopsys gets final approval to divest Optical Solutions Group and PowerArtist businesses to Keysight.
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California on October 10, 2025, Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) revealed that all required approvals have been secured for the intended divestitures of the Optical Solutions Group and PowerArtist businesses to Keysight.
